summary: Full backend and frontend testing of STEMScroll app. Backend: 13/14 tests pass. Frontend: Core flows working (onboarding 4-steps, feed with STEM cards, missions, library). Critical issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps Explore/Me nav tabs blocking user clicks.

minor.issue: Returns {cards: [...]} but api.js used d.saved || d causing Library to receive object not array. Fixed in api.js to use d.saved || d.cards || d and map to card_data.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge (fixed position bottom-right) overlaps Explore and Me nav tabs, intercepting click events. playwright force=True doesn't bypass the badge; JS .click() works.
Toast data-testid is 'save-toast' not 'toast'. Minor naming inconsistency. Save functionality works - toast appears visually.

integration_issues.issue: After api.js fix, saved cards from API (returned as {cards: [...]}) now correctly map to card_data. Before fix, Library showed 0 cards even when cards were saved.

issues: Made with Emergent badge overlaps right side of bottom nav (Explore + Me tabs) on mobile viewport 390px

action_items: Fix 'Made with Emergent' badge z-index or position so it doesn't block Explore/Me nav tab clicks on 390px mobile viewport. Consider moving badge or adjusting nav bar padding.
Verify Library now shows saved cards after api.js getSaved fix (maps card_data)
critical_code_review_comments: api.js getSaved: returned d.saved but backend uses 'cards' key - mismatch. Fixed.
Mission items data-testid is mission-${m.id} (correct), but Missions component does not have a loading/error state for the missions list fetch failures.
Generate card (Explore) calls /api/cards/generate - should verify this endpoint exists and works (uses Gemini AI).

success_rate.frontend: 75% (Onboarding✅ Feed✅ Missions✅ Library✅ Quiz✅ Save✅ Explore❌blocked Me❌blocked)

seed_data_creation: Backend seeded via API calls. Test UID: test_user_t1_001 (onboarded)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key test UID: test_user_t1_001 (already onboarded). Use localStorage.setItem('stemscroll_uid', 'test_user_t1_001') before reload to skip onboarding. Main issue: Made with Emergent badge blocks Explore/Me nav. api.js getSaved fix was applied. Test with mission detail click using data-testid='mission-${id}' (not mission-item-${id}).

rca_of_issues.saved_cards_library_bug: Backend GET /api/user/{uid}/saved returns {cards: [...]} but api.js expected d.saved key. Result: Library received full response object, Array.isArray check failed, showed empty state. Fix: api.js now uses d.saved || d.cards || d and maps each item to s.card_data || s to flatten the saved doc structure.
rca_of_issues.nav_tab_blocked: Made with Emergent widget renders at fixed position bottom-right with high z-index, overlapping the Explore and Me nav tabs on 390px viewport. The badge is ~156px wide and positioned right:0, covering the last two tabs of the 5-tab nav.
